title: Polymer clay feather-shaped earrings
notes: A pair of drop earrings in the shape of feathers, approximately 50 mm long, 15 mm wide. Rolled flat, cut to feather shape with a craft knife, then barbs incised with a needle tool from quill outward. Lightweight — 2 mm thick maximum. Cure, sand lightly to 400 grit, finish with gloss varnish. Earring posts or hooks attached after curing with jewellery adhesive.
